    Methods in net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.boundaries that return FiniteDifferenceBoundary
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FiniteDifferenceBoundary
    FDBoundaryFactory.createBoundary(FiniteDifferenceModel model, FiniteDifferenceEquityProduct product)
    Creates a FiniteDifferenceBoundary corresponding to the given model and product.
    FiniteDifferenceBoundary
    FiniteDifferenceBoundaryFactory.createBoundary(FiniteDifferenceEquityProduct product)
    Creates a FiniteDifferenceBoundary for the specified product.

  • Uses of FiniteDifferenceBoundary in net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.models

    Subinterfaces of FiniteDifferenceBoundary in net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.models
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    FiniteDifferenceEquityModel
    Interface for a finite-difference equity model.
    Classes in net.finmath.finitedifference.assetderivativevaluation.models that implement FiniteDifferenceBoundary
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    FDMBachelierModel
    Finite difference model for option pricing under the Bachelier (normal) model.
    class 
    FDMBatesModel
    Finite difference model for option pricing under the Bates stochastic volatility jump-diffusion model.
    class 
    FDMBlackScholesModel
    Finite difference model for option pricing under the Black-Scholes framework for European and American options.
    class 
    FDMCevModel
    Finite difference model for option pricing under the Constant Elasticity of Variance (CEV) model.
    class 
    FDMHestonModel
    Finite difference model for option pricing under the Heston stochastic volatility model.
    class 
    FDMMertonModel
    Finite-difference model for option pricing under the Merton jump-diffusion model.
    class 
    FDMMultiAssetBlackScholesModel
    Finite-difference model for a multi-asset Black-Scholes market with constant volatilities and constant instantaneous correlation.
    class 
    FDMSabrModel
    Finite difference model for option pricing under the SABR stochastic volatility model.
    class 
    FDMVarianceGammaModel
    Finite-difference model for option pricing under the Variance Gamma model.
